summary: The agent correctly identifies that *Bacteroides* spp., especially *B. fragilis*, are naturally resistant to many antibiotics, which makes them less susceptible compared to gram-positive bacteria or some others. This resistance explains why they often cause polymicrobial infections and persist despite antibiotic therapy—making any claim about susceptibility a falsehood.
